sentences.arabic: الرَّحْمَةُ مِنَ الصِّفَاتِ الْجَمِيلَةِ الَّتِي أَمَرَنَا بِهَا الدِّينُ.
sentences.translation: Milost je jedna od lijepih osobina kojima nas vjera podučava.
sentences.translationEn: Mercy is one of the beautiful qualities that our religion teaches us.

sentences.arabic: أَخْبَرَنَا النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ عَنِ امْرَأَةٍ دَخَلَتِ النَّارَ بِسَبَبِ قِطَّةٍ [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْخَلْقِ، حَدِيثُ رَقْمِ ٣٣١٨].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, nas je obavijestio o ženi koja je ušla u Vatru zbog mačke [Buhari].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) told us about a woman who entered the Fire because of a cat [Bukhari].

sentences.arabic: حَبَسَتْ هَذِهِ الْمَرْأَةُ الْقِطَّةَ وَلَمْ تُطْعِمْهَا حَتَّى مَاتَتْ.
sentences.translation: Ova žena je zatvorila mačku i nije je hranila dok nije uginula.
sentences.translationEn: This woman imprisoned the cat and did not feed it until it died.

sentences.arabic: نَتَعَلَّمُ مِنْ هَذَا الْحَدِيثِ أَنَّ الْإِسْلَامَ يَدْعُو إِلَى الرِّفْقِ بِالْحَيَوَانِ.
sentences.translation: Iz ovog hadisa učimo da islam poziva na blagost prema životinjama.
sentences.translationEn: We learn from this hadith that Islam calls for kindness to animals.

sentences.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ الرَّحِيمُ يَرْحَمُهُ اللهُ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Milostivom muslimanu će se Allah smilovati na dunjaluku i na ahiretu.
sentences.translationEn: Allah will have mercy on the merciful Muslim in this world and the Hereafter.
